case_title: VICTORINO LACAYO MARIN VS. CARROLL BENNETT

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,600.00 FILED BY MARIN, VICTORINO LACAYO AS TO DEFENDANT BENNETT, CARROLL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-11-2010 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-11-2010 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-08-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506))

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-08-2010 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-13-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT TO APPEAR WITH A SPANISH INTERPRETER. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPOTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-13-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-13-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. RUTH GALVEZ INTERPRETS ENGLISH/SPANISH - SPANISH/ENGLISH ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-13-2010 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARIN, VICTORINO LACAYO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BENNETT, CARROLL PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS BARRED BY THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
